title: rabdosia koroensis
intro: Rabdosia koroensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the Koroensis plant or Korean Rabdosia. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidative effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. In herbal preparations, Rabdosia koroensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, or combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
